---
title: Widgets
description: Every block you can drop into a theme zone — what each one does, what it reads, where it lives.
---

A **widget** is a draggable block in the theme builder. The builder's widget rail groups them into categories — **Template** (post/page/author content), **Sections** (visual hero/CTA-style blocks), **Media**, **Text**, **Layout**, **Site** (chrome).

This page is the at-a-glance reference. For each widget: what it shows, which template zones it's eligible for, and the most-used settings.

## Template category

### Hero Title
A full-bleed hero header with the post or page title overlaid on a background image. Optional avatar + author byline + date.

| Setting | What it does |
| --- | --- |
| Background image | Falls back to the post's featured image when empty (post templates only). |
| Image overlay | Color tint laid over the image so text reads. |
| Heading level / alignment | `h1/h2/h3`, left/center/right. |
| Author block | Show / hide the author. Pick display name vs. full name. Optional avatar + size + shape (original/circle). Optional `/author/<u>` link. |
| Date | Show / hide; uses the site's display format and timezone. |
| Colors | Per-element preset or custom hex for title / author / date. |
| Rounded corners | `rounded-2xl` on the outer section. |
| Vertical padding | Single rem value applied symmetrically. |

### Page Title / Post Title
Renders the page/post title as an `<h1>`. Reads from `metadata.page.title` / `metadata.post.title`.

### Post Meta
Author byline + published date + topic chips. Per-element toggles for each.

### Featured Image
The post's featured image as a standalone block. Pick aspect ratio (original / 16:9 / square) and rounded corners.

### Page Content / Post Content
The "body" placeholder. The active-theme renderer plugs the post/page's authored Puck body in here. **Essential** — present in every Single Page / Single Post / Pillar Post Main zone, can't be deleted.

### Recent Posts
A configurable grid or list of recent posts. Filter by topic, pillar, author, or "current scope" (uses whatever's in route context). Layout (grid / list / plain), thumbnail visibility, columns, aspect ratio, excerpt visibility, and pagination are all configurable.

The **Show excerpt** toggle (default off) displays the post's excerpt text below the title in both list and grid layouts. Excerpts are written in the post editor's **Excerpt** panel (right rail, collapsed by default).

### Table of Contents
Auto-generated from the post body's heading hierarchy. Sticky-on-scroll option for long-form pillar pages.

### Homepage Content
The Main zone of the homepage template. Auto-renders either:
- The chosen static page's body (when **Settings → Content → Homepage source** is set to a page), or
- A list of recent posts (other source modes).

Source picker and display options are global; edit them in **Settings → Content**. **Essential** — can't be deleted from the homepage's Main zone.

### Topic Archive Header
Header for `/topics/<slug>` archives — shows the topic name and description.

### Search Results
Renders the `/search` page's results list. **Essential** for the search-results template.

### 404 Message
Renders a customizable "page not found" message with optional CTA. **Essential** for the 404 template.

### Breadcrumbs
`Home → Section → Current page` navigation. Reads route context (post / page / topic / author) and builds the chain automatically.

### Author widgets (AuthorAvatar / AuthorName / AuthorBio / AuthorLinks / Author)
Per-piece widgets for the Author Profile template. AuthorAvatar renders the user's avatar with configurable size and shape; AuthorName renders the name; AuthorBio renders the bio; AuthorLinks renders the social-link icons; "Author" is the combined card with all of them stacked.

## Sections

Visual section blocks usable inside a page or post body, or in main zones of theme templates.

| Widget | What it is |
| --- | --- |
| **Hero** | Full-bleed image with overlay text + CTA button. Layouts: image-on-top (overlay) or image-beside-text (side-by-side). |
| **Banner** | Wide visual block, narrower than Hero. Optional headline overlay. |
| **Button** | A call-to-action link styled as a button. Configurable color (primary / navy / white / light / custom hex) and target (same/new tab). |
| **FAQ Section** | Question/answer accordion. |
| **Table** | Tabular data with header row + body cells. |

## Media

| Widget | What it is |
| --- | --- |
| **Image** | A single image. Alt, caption, alignment, link. |
| **Gallery** | A configured gallery from the media library. Layout (grid / carousel) and lightbox-on-click. |
| **YouTube** | Embedded YouTube video by URL. Auto-extracts the video ID. |

## Text

| Widget | What it is |
| --- | --- |
| **Heading** | H1/H2/H3 inside a body. (Different from PageTitle/PostTitle, which read from metadata.) |
| **Rich Text** | Body paragraphs with inline formatting, links, lists, blockquotes. Supports shortcodes (`[gallery]`, `[img]`, `[thumb]`). |
| **Text** | Plain text block with a few site-token shortcodes (`[title]`, `[tagline]`, `[site]`, `[url]`). |

## Layout

Composition primitives for multi-column / spacing structure.

### Layout
Multi-column row. Pick a width recipe:

| Variant | Track template |
| --- | --- |
| **100%** | Single column. |
| **1/2 + 1/2** | Two equal columns. |
| **1/3 + 1/3 + 1/3** | Three equal. |
| **1/4 + 1/4 + 1/4 + 1/4** | Four equal. |
| **1/4 + 1/2 + 1/4** | Sidebar / main / sidebar. |
| **1/4 + 3/4** / **3/4 + 1/4** | Sidebar + wide column. |
| **1/3 + 2/3** / **2/3 + 1/3** | Same with thirds. |
| **auto + max + auto** | Outer columns shrink to content; middle floods. Header rows. |
| **max + auto + auto** | Left floods; trailing columns are tight. Logo + nav + actions. |
| **max + auto** | Two-column "title + action" row. |

Per-column alignment + per-side padding configurable.

### Spacer
Vertical space between blocks. Pick a height in rem.

### Separator
Horizontal rule. Color preset or custom hex.

### Sticky Container
Wrap content that should stick to the top of the viewport on scroll. Useful for sidebars with a "current section" indicator, or a sticky CTA.

## Site

Chrome — same on every page.

| Widget | What it is |
| --- | --- |
| **Site Logo** | The site's logo image, links to home. Falls back to text site title. |
| **Search Box** | A search input that posts to `/search`. |
| **Nav Menu** | A menu by slug — rendered as a horizontal nav or vertical list depending on parent layout. |
| **Social Icons** | A row of social-link icons. Pull from Settings → Site identity. |

## Newspaper

Magazine-style widgets for editorial homepages and section pages. They server-render a post grid from a topic or pillar filter; some have client-side tab strips and prev/next pagination for browsing without a page reload.

| Widget | What it is |
| --- | --- |
| **Newspaper Hero** | Dominant above-the-fold block — 1 large featured card + grid of smaller cards. Two layouts: side-by-side (featured left, 2×2 grid right) or stacked (featured on top, 2-column grid below). |
| **Newspaper Section** | Single-scope section block — labeled header, 3-column card grid, prev/next pagination arrows. |
| **Newspaper — Hero + Side List** | Section block with a featured card on the left and a list of thumbnail rows on the right. Supports a tab strip for switching between multiple pillars or topics. |
| **Newspaper — Two Featured + Rows Grid** | Dense section block — two featured cards across the top, then a 2-column grid of list rows below. Also supports tab strips. |

All four widgets share **Show date / author / topic chip / excerpt** toggles and **Display style** (Overlays: text on image with tint, or Cards: text below image).

For full settings details, see [Newspaper widgets](/docs/themes/newspaper-widgets).

## Where each widget can live

The widget rail filters by surface — when you're editing **Single Post**, the rail only shows widgets that have declared themselves eligible for the `template-single-post` surface. So the rail is a curated list per template, not the full system inventory.

| Surface | Typical widgets |
| --- | --- |
| Header | Layout, SiteLogo, NavMenu, SearchBox, SocialIcons |
| Footer | Layout, NavMenu, SocialIcons, Text, Separator |
| Sidebar | NavMenu, Recent Posts, TableOfContents, Text, StickyContainer, Newspaper Section |
| Single Post / Pillar Post main | Hero Title, PostTitle, PostMeta, PostFeaturedImage, PostContent (essential), TableOfContents, Recent Posts |
| Single Page main | Hero Title, PageTitle, PageContent (essential) |
| Topic Archive main | Topic Archive Header, Recent Posts, Hero, Newspaper Section |
| Search Results main | SearchResults (essential), SearchBox |
| 404 main | NotFoundMessage (essential), SearchBox, Recent Posts |
| Author Profile main | AuthorAvatar, AuthorName, AuthorBio, AuthorLinks, Recent Posts |
| Homepage main | HomepageMain (essential), Hero, Recent Posts, Newspaper Hero, Newspaper Section, Newspaper — Hero + Side List, Newspaper — Two Featured + Rows Grid |

## Essential widgets

Some widgets are marked **essential** — they're pre-seeded into specific Main zones and can't be deleted from there:

| Widget | Essential in |
| --- | --- |
| HomepageMain | Homepage Main |
| PageContent | Single Page Main |
| PostContent | Single Post Main, Pillar Post Main |
| SearchResults | Search Results Main |
| NotFoundMessage | 404 Main |

They're hidden from the widget rail on the template where they're essential (no point dragging a second one in) and the per-instance toolbar's Delete is disabled. Other widgets can sit before and after them in the same Main zone freely.

## Adding a new widget to your theme

Custom widgets live in the theme's `themes/<slug>/blocks/` directory and register themselves via the cross-surface block registry. See [Developer → Plugin system → Theme widgets](/docs/developer/plugins/theme-widgets) for the contract.
